rationale: Title X is stronger overall because it includes the key design detail and sample size, which is important for a feasibility series and helps set reader expectations. Title Y is slightly cleaner and more explicit about left atrial appendage thrombus, but it loses specificity by omitting the 12-patient series detail.
loser_weakness: Title Y is clear but more generic; “A Feasibility Study” gives less information about study scale and design than “A Feasibility Series of 12 Patients.”
